sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70095" key="nekroko/smos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεκρο-κόσμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">laying corpses out for burial,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.994e</biblScope> </bibl> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κόμοις</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
